customer_name: Edith Contreras and Luis Estrada Sanchez
site_name: Edith Contreras and Luis Estrada Sanchez

citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:39 am on
4/9/2026. The inspector was able to reach the licensee at the listed primary contact phone number. The licensee stated
they were gone to an appointment and not available for a facility inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility,
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is
serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.

they were gone to an appointment and not available for a facility inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, 
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is 
serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
